CAESAR 6x6 — 155mm/52-calibre self-propelled howitzer (KNDS)

The CAESAR 6x6 is a 155mm/52-calibre truck-mounted self-propelled howitzer developed by KNDS (Nexter). It is in service with several armies and has been widely exported. It competes in the mounted gun system segment.

CAESAR 6x6 — key specifications
SpecificationValue
Calibre155 mm / 52 calibre
Maximum rangeover 40 km (ERFB)
Rate of fire6 rounds per minute
Crew5
Chassis6x6 truck
